name: xebon
description: CLI for scaffolding and updating xebon blogs

scripts.build: esbuild src/index.tsx --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --format=esm --outfile=dist/index.js --alias:react-devtools-core=./src/stubs/react-devtools-core.js --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);" && chmod +x dist/index.js
